Title: Star Trek: Lower Decks
Actors: Tawny Newsome, Jack Quaid, Noël Wells
Plot: Boldly going where no one has gone before, Star Trek: Lower Decks follows the underdogs of Starfleet and their crazy adventures traversing the universe, helping civilizations and new life, and keeping up appearances without making total fools of themselves along the way. It's Star Trek, but more irreverent than you've ever seen it before.
Awards: Nominated for 3 Primetime Emmys. 5 wins & 36 nominations total
